---
id: cad-pipeline
title: "Execute a chained pipeline"
description: "Runs multiple operations sequentially in a single worker. Use `$ref:N` in params to reference step N's result. Optionally pass `outputs` to convert the final OCCT shape result into downloadable formats (STEP, GLB, decomposed mesh)."
sidebar_label: "Execute a chained pipeline"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/open/bitbybit-cad-cloud-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Execute a chained pipeline"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/cad/pipeline"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Runs multiple operations sequentially in a single worker. Use `$ref:N` in params to reference step N's result. Optionally pass `outputs` to convert the final OCCT shape result into downloadable formats (STEP, GLB, decomposed mesh).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>
